title: Blithe Banners
description: Adds 14 new banner patterns to decorate with

# Blithe Banners
Adds 14 new Banner patterns to decorate with.
- Open Roundel
- Open Lozenge
- Square
- Open Square
- Wash
- Open Chevron
- Inverted Open Chevron
- 5th Stripes
- Heart
- Open Heart
